title: SafeMap AI
description: Real-time global travel safety platform with a 3D WebGL globe, AI-powered chatbot, and serverless backend. Won 3rd Place at Escape The Vincii '26 against 100+ teams.

title: Women Safety SOS Device
description: IoT hardware device for rural women's safety featuring GPS tracking and instant voice distress alerts. Built for the IIT Delhi Build for Rural India Hackathon.
award: IIT Delhi Build for Rural India Hackathon

title: VANGUARD Digital Twin
description: Heritage site protection system using IoT sensors paired with a live web dashboard. Monitors environmental conditions in real time to preserve cultural landmarks.

title: MindCanvas
description: Anonymous collaborative mental health diary with real-time sync. A safe space for users to express thoughts, track moods, and connect with others anonymously.

title: RevvUp
description: Car modification ecosystem with a build tracker, community showcase, and vendor connections. Helps enthusiasts plan, track, and share vehicle build projects.
